name: assumption inversion
prompt: Name the hidden assumptions that make the request seem easy, then invert each one and ask what evidence would prove the inverted case false.

calibration.business: Use business-facing wording: outcomes, policy, users, acceptance, and decision ownership; avoid implementation jargon.
calibration.technical: Use technical wording: data contracts, interfaces, constraints, failure modes, observability, and implementation surfaces.

evidence_contract: Only assumptions grounded in local evidence can become challenge gaps; otherwise they stay narrative notes.
